solutions.title: Solution (Neon)
solutions.content:
fun main
()
=
repeat
(
readLine
()!!.
toInt
())
{
val
(
n
,
k
)
=
readLine
()!!.
split
(
" "
).
map
{
it
.
toInt
()
}
var
ans
=
0
repeat
(
n
)
{
val
(
l
,
r
)
=
readLine
()!!.
split
(
" "
).
map
{
it
.
toInt
()
}
if
(
l
<=
k
)
ans
=
maxOf
(
ans
,
r
-
k
+
1
)
}
println
(
ans
)
}
